description: tranks you for 50 Million views ! FN #fun #funny #sora #sora2
prompt_text: A brightly lit living room during the holiday season. The central figure is a large man with a beard, wearing a green Christmas sweater with red reindeer and snowflake patterns, black shorts, and a red and white Santa hat. He is standing in the middle of the room where a massive, digital-effect pile of brown sludge or 'feces' is rapidly accumulating on the floor. In the background, there is a white couch, a decorated Christmas tree with lights, and framed pictures on the wall. The scene transitions from the man squatting as the pile grows to him standing waist-deep in the substance, holding a large gold '0' balloon.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A brightly lit living room during the holiday season. The central figure is a large man with a beard, wearing a green Christmas sweater with red reindeer and snowflake patterns, black shorts, and a red and white Santa hat. He is standing in the middle of the room where a massive, digital-effect pile of brown sludge or 'feces' is rapidly accumulating on the floor. In the background, there is a white couch, a decorated Christmas tree with lights, and framed pictures on the wall. The scene transitions from the man squatting as the pile grows to him standing waist-deep in the substance, holding a large gold '0' balloon.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium-wide shot, slightly low angle, following the man's movements. The camera cuts between the side profile of the man squatting and a close-up of his face.

actions: The man squats repeatedly in a rhythmic fashion.
A large, animated brown mass rapidly erupts and piles up on the floor behind him with each squat.
The man looks directly into the camera and smiles.
The man becomes submerged up to his waist in the growing brown pile.
The man cheers and holds up a large, gold, inflatable number '0' balloon.
